    C

    CanMoveHere(float, float, float, float, int[][]) - Static method in class utilz.HelpMethods
    Determines if an entity can move to a specified position based on the level's data.
    canSeePlayer(int[][], Player) - Method in class entities.Enemy
    hecks if the player is visible to the enemy.
    changeHealth(int) - Method in class components.AnimationComponent
    Changes the current health by the given value.
    changeHealth(int) - Method in class entities.Player
    Changes the player's health by a specified amount.
    changeWalkDir() - Method in class entities.Enemy
    Changes the walking direction of the enemy.
    checkEnemyHit(Rectangle2D.Float) - Method in class entities.EnemyManager
    Checks if any enemy is hit.
    checkEnemyHit(Rectangle2D.Float) - Method in class gamestates.Playing
    Checks if the player's attack hit any enemies.
    checkObhectHit(Rectangle2D.Float) - Method in class gamestates.Playing
     
    checkObjectHit(Rectangle2D.Float) - Method in class objects.ObjectManager
    Checks if any containers are hit by the specified attackbox.
    checkObjectTouched(Rectangle2D.Float) - Method in class objects.ObjectManager
    Checks if any of the potions are touched by the specified hitbox.
    checkPlayerHit(Rectangle2D.Float, Player) - Method in class entities.Enemy
    Checks if the enemy successfully hits the player during attack.
    checkPotionTouched(Rectangle2D.Float) - Method in class gamestates.Playing
    Checks if the player touched potion..
    checkTrapsTouched(Player) - Method in class objects.ObjectManager
    hecks if any traps are touched by the player.
    checkTrapTouched(Player) - Method in class gamestates.Playing
     
    Coin - Class in objects
    The Coin class represents a collectible coin object in the game.

    Constants - Class in utilz
    The Constants class holds constant values for various aspects of the game, including object types, * enemy attributes, UI settings, and player actions.
